message:
fix: address round 3 review issues across 6 areas

- Move subscribeSessionEvents from defaultFactory to SessionController
  constructor to prevent accumulating duplicate subscriptions on each
  submitGoal call (critical bug)
- Remove dead code: onEvent(), eventCallback, per-handle event
  subscription from AgentSpawner
- Remove unused agentEvents import from spawner.ts
- Consolidate duplicate subscribeSessionEvents tests in spawner.test.ts
- Update mock spawner in cli.test.ts with subscribeSessionEvents method

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
